flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Fletcher Technical Community College rose 83% between 2017 and 2020 ($5.5k → $10.1k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Fletcher Technical Community College fell 80% between 2006 and 2009 (42.8% → 8.7%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 8 pp at Fletcher Technical Community College vs the 2003–2007 baseline (25.5% vs 33.9%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Fletcher Technical Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (4.3% → 0.0%).
